bot.notes: Primary verified live-routed bot for Milestone C; operator mapping corrected so Bot1 is STX and MDX-derived settings remain the runtime source of truth

trading.notes: Execution allowlist expanded to support the full multi-bot symbol set; actual live trading is still controlled by per-bot enabled state in bots.json.

positionSizing.notes: Cautious live validation baseline: use 10% of account until all bots are proven operationally.

riskControls.notes: Duplicate/stale signal controls are scaffolded here for later enforcement. Zero values are placeholders and should not enable enforcement until defined.

takeProfit.notes: MDX-derived balanced profile take-profit ladder is the runtime source of truth for Bot1.

stopLoss.notes: MDX-derived balanced profile stop-loss is the runtime source of truth for Bot1.

breakEven.notes: MDX-derived balanced profile break-even trigger is the runtime source of truth for Bot1.

dca.notes: DCA is strategically important but intentionally scaffolded only in Sprint 3. Strategy values to be defined later.

s3.notes: Shadow-mode scoring only. No execution changes. supportResistance is stubbed at neutral weight 0 in v1.

priceMonitoring.notes: samplingIntervalMs can be raised later to reduce storage volume for longer-running deployments.

errors.message: Trading cannot be enabled while TP/SL/BE placeholder zero values exist

issues.message: Trading cannot be enabled while TP/SL/BE placeholder zero values exist

warnings: slType is metadata-only in D3 and not runtime-mapped: ATR
slValue is metadata-only in D3 and not runtime-mapped
